description: Determines the specific effect for Travel & Movement spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Travel & Movement spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Cause someone or something to move faster

resultTranslations.en: Cause someone or something to move faster

entries.result: Climb walls and surfaces with ease

resultTranslations.en: Climb walls and surfaces with ease

entries.result: Cause someone or something else to stop moving, immobilizing or slowing it

resultTranslations.en: Cause someone or something else to stop moving, immobilizing or slowing it

entries.result: Swim in water as fast as any natural sea creature

resultTranslations.en: Swim in water as fast as any natural sea creature

entries.result: Receive magical guidance on which way to go

resultTranslations.en: Receive magical guidance on which way to go

entries.result: Create a temporary magical mount, such as a horse, to ride

resultTranslations.en: Create a temporary magical mount, such as a horse, to ride

entries.result: Drift or float as if light as a cloud

resultTranslations.en: Drift or float as if light as a cloud

entries.result: Give yourself or others flight

resultTranslations.en: Give yourself or others flight

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-8 for this context

entries.result: Pass through solid objects

resultTranslations.en: Pass through solid objects

entries.result: Travel through someone's thoughts, memories, or dreams

resultTranslations.en: Travel through someone's thoughts, memories, or dreams

entries.result: Create a magical shortcut between two distant places. The shortcut must still be traveled, and it may be perilous in its own way

resultTranslations.en: Create a magical shortcut between two distant places. The shortcut must still be traveled, and it may be perilous in its own way

entries.result: Teleport short distances

resultTranslations.en: Teleport short distances

entries.result: Facilitate inconvenient travel by changing reality, such as making an elevator larger inside to hold a hundred people or allowing a plane to keep flying even when it's run out of fuel

resultTranslations.en: Facilitate inconvenient travel by changing reality, such as making an elevator larger inside to hold a hundred people or allowing a plane to keep flying even when it's run out of fuel

entries.result: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

resultTranslations.en: Choose the most dramatic effect from 1-15 for this context

entries.result: Travel on or through something that normally would be impossible, such as riding on a cloud or walking on water

resultTranslations.en: Travel on or through something that normally would be impossible, such as riding on a cloud or walking on water

entries.result: Teleport vast distances

resultTranslations.en: Teleport vast distances

entries.result: Move between dimensions or realities

resultTranslations.en: Move between dimensions or realities
